resources.string: Device Masker - Comprehensive device spoofing with anti-detection
Enable in LSPosed Manager and reboot
A group with this name already exists
This action cannot be undone. All assigned apps will use their default settings.
Create a group to start assigning spoofed identities.
Save or share in-memory diagnostics logs

Logs exported successfully (%1$d entries)
Saved to: %2$s
Save logs to a file on your device
Check module health and hook status
Hooks are being applied to target apps
Xposed classes hidden from stack traces
Configuration updates apply immediately when the live module service is available. If the service is unavailable, the app falls back to cached preferences and some target apps may need a restart.
Double tap to expand or collapse
libxposed API 100 and LSPosed compatibility details
Groups update automatically. Pull to refresh is unavailable.
Delete this group? This action cannot be undone. All assigned apps will use their default settings.

Configuration updates apply immediately when the live module service is available.
If the service is unavailable, cached preferences may require a target app restart.
